response.justification: Highly experienced full-stack engineer with 13+ years across web, mobile, and embedded systems, currently working on AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators) at re:cinq — directly relevant to the role's AI agent development requirement. Strong TypeScript/Node.js/React background with MongoDB, AWS, and Docker experience. Gaps in Nest.js, Vitest, and Kotlin/Java for backend services are minor given the candidate's demonstrated polyglot adaptability and craftsmanship focus (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development).
strengths: Current AI-agent and MCP tooling experience directly matches a required skill
13+ years polyglot full-stack across TS/Node/React with cloud (AWS CDK) and containers
Software craftsmanship discipline: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, plus public teaching/workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed in the primary stack
Kotlin/Java exposure is dated (robotics work pre-2018); limited recent JVM backend depth
Heavy DLang investment may not transfer; PostgreSQL not explicitly mentioned (MongoDB/MySQL only)
